headline: Knowledge Distillation
description: Knowledge distillation transfers knowledge from a large teacher model to a smaller student model. The student learns to mimic the teacher's softened output probabilities (not just hard labels). This enables deploying compact models with near-teacher performance — critical for edge devices and mobile applications.

citation.name: Distilling the Knowledge in a Neural Network (Hinton, Vinyals, Dean)
